title: TestEquity Announces New Executive Leadership Team to Drive Growth as the Leading Distribution Platform for Test and Measurement Solutions, Electronics Production Supplies, and Services
description: TestEquity names new executive leaders to accelerate AmpX growth strategy across sales, digital commerce, merchandising, and operations....

title: Is Amprius–Matternet Drone Battery Co‑Development Altering The Investment Case For Amprius Technologies (AMPX)?
description:
In May 2026, Amprius Technologies and Matternet announced a collaboration to integrate Amprius’s high‑energy‑density silicon anode cells into Matternet’s M2 and next‑generation autonomous delivery aircraft, tailoring battery systems to the aircraft architecture and delivery network.
An interesting angle is that the partners plan deep co‑development on factors like form factor, thermal performance, and charge rate, aiming to tune entire battery systems around Matternet’s expanding drone...
